evals.prompt: 구현된 페이지 https://staging.evar.co.kr/dashboard 와 figma 디자인 https://figma.com/design/XYZ789/dashboard?node-id=10-20 비교해서 차이점 알려줘. 모바일/데스크톱 둘 다.
evals.expected_output: Captures both Figma frames (mobile + desktop variants if available) and uses Playwright at matching viewports (375 + 1440). Reports structured findings citing Figma node IDs and screenshot/computed-style evidence. Covers at least: layout/spacing, typography, color, state coverage.

evals.prompt: 이 컴포넌트가 디자인 시스템 토큰을 안 쓰고 있는 것 같아. 검수해줘. https://app.evar.co.kr/settings/profile 의 저장 버튼.
evals.expected_output: Uses browser_evaluate to read computed styles of the save button, compares against design tokens via get_variable_defs, flags any hardcoded values that should reference tokens. Distinguishes drift findings from design-side issues.

evals.prompt: 퍼블리싱 검토 부탁. 최근 머지된 PR #123 의 결제 페이지가 디자인이랑 매칭되는지.
evals.expected_output: Asks for both the figma URL and the deployed/preview URL before proceeding (no one-sided review). Once provided, runs the standard fidelity matrix audit at all design-defined viewports and states.
